# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About רונן קלר וויליאמס
Ronen Keller Williams is a real estate brokerage operating under the globally recognized Keller Williams brand. The business focuses on property mediation and real estate transactions, likely serving buyers, sellers, and investors in the Israeli market.
